title: Horror Game
description: This is a horror world where you will find familiar horror characters and horror structures
body:
This is a mode where you are constantly being watched...

For example
there is Herobrine
The One Who Follows...

You will be constantly being chased by Goat Man, Man From The Fog and other horror mobs...

You can get into Man From The Fog's dimension or find horror structures

In the caves you will meet Cave Dweller
At night, most of the ones I mentioned!

You can defend yourself against all of them with high-caliber weapons:
Submachine guns, Sniper rifles, Glocks and Shotguns![The Man Who Watches](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44bd7e254ba868609dc6d51bf91d03fd4733b23e.webp)
